hero.title: Momei
hero.subtitle: AI-powered, Global Creation. An intelligent blog system tailored for developers.

meaning.title: Origin and Meaning
meaning.text_1: The name "Momei" (Ink Plum) is inspired by the poem "Ink Plum" by Wang Mian of the Yuan Dynasty:
meaning.poem:
"My home is by the tree near the ink-washing pool,
Every flower blooms with faint traces of ink.
I don't need people to praise its good color,
Only leaving a clear fragrance filling the universe."
meaning.text_2: Taking "Mo" (Ink) symbolizes writing and cultivation, echoing the essence of blog content; taking "Mei" (Plum) implies the tenacious creative spirit and unique personal style.
meaning.intro: Momei platform is dedicated to providing creators with:
features: Seamless blog migration tools and SEO preservation
Global reach by bridging language gaps with AI

items.desc: Goes beyond UI translation with cluster-based content management and smart language routing.

feedback.title: Feedback and Support
feedback.subtitle: Please first determine whether the issue belongs to the Momei project itself or to the site currently running this deployment. Each path has a different contact entry.

meta.description: Separate core Momei project issues from site-specific deployment issues and reach the right feedback channel quickly.

project.title: Report an issue with the Momei project
project.description: Use the official repository if you hit a product bug, documentation mistake, feature request, or a generic compatibility issue.

items.bug: Product bugs, regressions, and unexpected behavior
items.feature: Feature requests, roadmap input, and UX suggestions
items.docs: Documentation, translation, or example configuration mistakes

deployment.title: Contact the administrator of {site}
deployment.description: If the issue only happens on this site, such as local login policy, moderation rules, theme settings, or self-hosted infrastructure, contact this deployment first.
deployment.no_contact: This site has not published a feedback URL or contact email yet. Please reach out to the administrator of {site} directly.

items.login: Account, login, registration, or permission issues on this site
items.content: Site content, friend links, comments, submissions, or moderation issues
items.policy: Theme, notification, storage, or deployment settings specific to this site
